Q1 Premium Masking tape 50 mm x 50 mtr

[Description](#blocks-6985bd738a809-tab-1)
[Specifications](#blocks-6985bd738a809-tab-2)
[Ask a Question](javascript:open_popup(22))Seven day clean removal
Multiple surfaces
Premium Masking tape Indoor is a semi crepe paper masking tape with natural rubber based adhesive. This tape is designed for almost all indoor paint works, so it’s not UV and water resistant. It sticks well to multiple and irregular surfaces such as walls, baseboards, trims, wood, metal.
Premium Masking tape Indoor assures a clean and easy removal within 7 days, without leaving any residue on the application surface or peeling of the substrate. It performs in overlapping the tape, with masking paper and masking film with excellent holding power.

sources.cleaned_content:
top of page

Log In / Sign Up
[Home

](https://www.ccpaints.co.uk/account/my-wishlist)

![image](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/92644e_fae3dd9c664b448390a5c2df36477c22~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_80,h_80,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/92644e_fae3dd9c664b448390a5c2df36477c22~mv2.png)

Q1® Premium Masking Tape is an automotive masking tape designed to combine consistent unwinding, easy tear and conformability, performing extremely well when used tape on tape and with masking paper and protective film. Car masking tape can be used for masking the surfaces near the area to paint, where other masking products cannot be applied. The tape is widely used also to fasten masking paper or masking film to the car body.

Q1®automotive masking tape is made with premium crepe paper with natural rubber base adhesive, specific for automotive car refinishing applications during drying cycles at high temperatures up to 110°C/230°F. It guarantees high adhesion and doesn’t leave adhesive traces when removed.

**Features & Benefits**

- Conforms well to curved and irregular surfaces without lifting or tearing
- UV resistance up to 3 days
- Thin backing designed to leave low profile paint edges and to better work around corners delivering sharp and clean paint edges
- Specially formulated adhesive for clean and easy one piece removal
- Performs at high temperatures up to 110° C (30 min)
- Solvent & Waterborne paints compatible
Size: 48mm x 50m (2")

# Q1 Premium Automotive Masking Tape 48mm (2")

# Q1® Premium Masking Tape

Instant adhesion, sharp edges and a bright yellow shade.

[![image](/Content/assets/images/download-catalouge.png)Download
Catalog](/media/ab5boslq/q1_automotive_global.pdf)
[![image](/Content/assets/images/download-technical-sheet.png)Download
Technical Data Sheet](/media/apklmy43/q1_premium-masking-tape_eng.pdf)

[Become a reseller](#getintouch)

Q1® Premium Masking Tape is designed to deliver high performance and excellent results in the most demanding conditions. The product has been improved for UV resistance up to 3 days.

Thanks to its advanced adhesive formulation, it offers high adhesion without leaving residue when removed from the surface. Its balanced structure allows for controlled unwinding, as well as giving it excellent adaptability and extreme effectiveness when used “tape on tape”.

The backing is designed to achieve an accurate profile of paint edges and allow easier work around corners. The bright yellow color allows you to see through the tape for more precise masking lines and allow superior visibility of masked areas.

![image](/media/obwg2jdq/premium-tapebottom.jpg)
![image](/media/obwg2jdq/premium-tapebottom.jpg)

### Features & benefits

- Conforms well to curved and irregular surfaces without lifting or tearing

- UV resistance up to 3 days

- Thin backing designed to leave low profile paint edges and to better work around corners delivering sharp and clean paint edges

- Specially formulated adhesive for clean and easy one piece removal

- Performs at high temperatures up to 110° C (30 min)

- Solvent & Waterborne paints compatible

### Product reference
